title: Exide Industries is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Exide Industries is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Quality Control Engineer looking for your next big career move? Exide Industries in Kolkata offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Exide Industries:
Exide Industries is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in FMEA

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Flexible working hours
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Exide Industries!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
